title: Weekly Google Trends Surge In Home Appliance Repair Searches Signals Bullish Consumer Discretionary
thesis: An increase in DIY appliance repair searches indicates rising consumer stress on appliance replacements, boosting sales in home improvement and retail discretionary sectors. Consumers delaying appliance replacement but buying parts or services benefits discretionary retailers and specialty repair companies.
signal_logic: Enter long on XLY if weekly Google Trends for 'home appliance repair' rises 15%+ week-over-week
entry_exit: Entry: Enter long on XLY if weekly Google Trends for 'home appliance repair' rises 15%+ week-over-week Exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if the search interest declines 10% from peak
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search interest via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Search interest fluctuates frequently with seasonal and economic stress factors.

schema.idea: Weekly Google Trends Surge In 'Home Appliance Repair' Searches Signals Bullish Consumer Discretionary
schema.behavior: An increase in DIY appliance repair searches indicates rising consumer stress on appliance replacements, boosting sales in home improvement and retail discretionary sectors.

market_impact.rationale: Consumers delaying appliance replacement but buying parts or services benefits discretionary retailers and specialty repair companies.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long on XLY if weekly Google Trends for 'home appliance repair' rises 15%+ week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if the search interest declines 10% from peak

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Search interest fluctuates frequently with seasonal and economic stress factors.

title: Daily Spike In Rss Counts For Warehouse Automation Failure Signals Bearish Industrials
thesis: News spikes about warehouse automation failures raise concerns about logistics efficiency risks, pressuring industrial sector stocks. Failures in warehouse automation can delay shipments and increase costs.
data_sources: RSS news feed counts for warehouse automation failure
signal_logic: Enter short on XLI if daily RSS counts for 'warehouse automation failure' mentions triple compared to 10-day average
entry_exit: Entry: Enter short on XLI if daily RSS counts for 'warehouse automation failure' mentions triple compared to 10-day average Exit: Exit after 5 trading days or when mentions revert below average
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use RSS news feed counts for warehouse automation failure via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Automation glitches and failures are regularly reported and cause news volume spikes.

schema.idea: Daily Spike In RSS Counts For Warehouse Automation Failure Signals Bearish Industrials

data.source: RSS news feed counts for warehouse automation failure

schema.behavior: News spikes about warehouse automation failures raise concerns about logistics efficiency risks, pressuring industrial sector stocks.

market_impact.rationale: Failures in warehouse automation can delay shipments and increase costs.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short on XLI if daily RSS counts for 'warehouse automation failure' mentions triple compared to 10-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or when mentions revert below average

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Automation glitches and failures are regularly reported and cause news volume spikes.

title: Daily Surge In Ev Charger Installations Signals Bullish Communication Services
thesis: Rapid increase in new EV charger installations indicates accelerating electric vehicle adoption and related telecom infrastructure demand. EV growth drives demand for telecom and connected vehicle technologies in communication services.
signal_logic: Enter long on XLC if daily new EV charger installations increase by 25%+ compared to 7-day average
entry_exit: Entry: Enter long on XLC if daily new EV charger installations increase by 25%+ compared to 7-day average Exit: Exit after 10 trading days or if installations fall below 7-day average
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Open-Charge-Map daily EV charger counts via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: EV infrastructure growth is accelerating with periodic surges.

schema.behavior: Rapid increase in new EV charger installations indicates accelerating electric vehicle adoption and related telecom infrastructure demand.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long on XLC if daily new EV charger installations increase by 25%+ compared to 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 10 trading days or if installations fall below 7-day average

title: Weekly Fred Series Jump In Producer Price Index Signals Bearish Basic Materials
thesis: A sudden increase in PPI signals rising input costs that compress margins for basic materials companies. Higher input costs reduce profitability in commodity and materials sectors.
data_sources: FRED Producer Price Index (PPI) weekly derived
signal_logic: Enter short on XLB if weekly PPI rises by more than 0.7% week-over-week
entry_exit: Entry: Enter short on XLB if weekly PPI rises by more than 0.7% week-over-week Exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when PPI growth slows below 0.2% weekly
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use FRED Producer Price Index (PPI) weekly derived via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: PPI data often has periodic jumps reflecting commodity price shocks.

data.source: FRED Producer Price Index (PPI) weekly derived

market_impact.rationale: Higher input costs reduce profitability in commodity and materials sectors.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short on XLB if weekly PPI rises by more than 0.7% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when PPI growth slows below 0.2% weekly

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: PPI data often has periodic jumps reflecting commodity price shocks.

title: Daily Spike In Local Weather Heatwave Signals Bullish Utilities
thesis: Sudden heatwaves increase electricity demand for cooling, boosting utility sector revenues. Heat spikes drive higher power consumption and utility billing.
signal_logic: Enter long on XLU if daily max temperature exceeds 95°F and is 10°F above 7-day average
entry_exit: Entry: Enter long on XLU if daily max temperature exceeds 95°F and is 10°F above 7-day average Exit: Exit after 5 trading days or if temperatures normalize
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Open-Meteo daily temperature data via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Heatwaves are seasonal and frequently occur with sudden spikes.

trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or if temperatures normalize
